title: noronhia obtusifolia var. thouarsii
intro: Noronhia obtusifolia var. thouarsii, also known as Thouars' noronhia, is a plant species belonging to the family Olacaceae, native to Madagascar. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Noronhia obtusifolia var. thouarsii include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, digestive issues, and skin problems, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Noronhia obtusifolia var. thouarsii can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are traditionally used in Malagasy medicine.
